inputs.normalization_note: Q1 2026 stockholders' equity $240.2M; wind-down legacy iStar assets + ~13.5M Safehold shares; not normalized operating FCF.

optionality_gate.notes: Price ~57% below Q1 2026 book; asset-sale and repurchase path; margin loan on SAFE stake caps downside vs zero but adds complexity.

nav_overlay.correction_note: Prior cash_net_debt per_share of -1.19 was arithmetic error ((67.2-207)/shares≈-11.6). Corrected; residual Magnolia/Asbury carrying outside MD&A monetizing bucket added.

lines.label: Safehold Inc. stake (~13.525M shares implied)
lines.evidence: Q1 FV $183.0M at SAFE $13.53; implied shares 13,525,499. Current SAFE $16.93 → $229.0M (18.95/sh).

lines.label: MD&A monetizing portfolio (loan, AFS, land, other props)
lines.evidence: Q1 MD&A: loan $16.1M + AFS $38.2M + land $14.4M + other props $2.7M.

lines.label: Residual land & development + operating real estate
lines.evidence: L&D net $100.5M + RE net $70.2M minus monetizing land/other already counted.

lines.label: Safe Credit Facility + Margin Loan (net)
lines.evidence: Safe Credit $115.0M @ 8%; Margin Loan $92.8M @ SOFR+3.50%; debt net $207.0M. Prior overlay used wrong -1.19/sh.

bear.notes: Slow legacy sales; SAFE mark compression; buybacks stall

base.notes: ~75% of Q1 book realized via asset sales, SAFE dividends, and repurchases

lines.label: Wind-down realization haircut
lines.math: Base assumes 75% of book ($15/sh) not full $19.88

stance_proposal.override_reason: Externally managed by Safehold affiliate; wind-down timing uncertain despite book discount

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Some legacy assets at zero carrying value; SAFE marked to market

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Magnolia Green ~1,900 acres entitled; Asbury Park waterfront venture deconsolidated 3/27/2026

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Single wind-down segment; Q1 net loss driven by SAFE mark and operating costs

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: 13.5M SAFE shares $183M fair value; margin loan limits sale timing

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Capital return via repurchases, not recurring distributions

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Revenue from leases, loan interest, SAFE dividends

safe_deal_mark.note: High SAFE component uses ~$25 path; not a put. Rate-driven.

ground_lease_duration.evidence: SAFE IR: ~99-year typical leases; ~91–92 year W.A. extended term. Long-duration equity mark.

catalyst_paths.impact: ~75% of Q1 book realized via asset sales, SAFE dividends, and repurchases
Slow legacy sales; SAFE mark compression; buybacks stall

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

top_dissents.label: Murray Stahl
top_dissents.falsifier: No asset intensity / pricing power (moat eroding + non-croupier)

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete component schedule; preserve the range and evidence block until every material assumption is reconciled.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: SAFE stake, MD&A monetizing assets, residual Magnolia/Asbury carrying, cash, senior debt, fee reserve, and residual optionality are valued once.

valuation.evidence: Q1 2026 Form 10-Q (STHO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260508_rpt20260331_acc0001953366_26_000010.htm); proof base 18.478/sh via net_asset_value@1.0.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings and mark-to-market updates before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: SAFE fails to re-rate with lower rates, or forced sale/collateral path nets below the low case.

source.locator: 12,081,333 shares outstanding as of 2026-05-06 cover page
Note 7: ~13.5M SAFE shares; FV $183.0M at $13.53 implies 13,525,499 shares

assumptions.rationale: Low forced-sale mark; base near Q1 filing mark updated to July 2026 quote; high path toward March 2023 ~$25 deal mark (rate-sensitive ground leases).

assumptions.rationale: Gross SAFE mark per share before margin-loan netting in senior_debt component.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of STHO, including every identified asset, liability, and option in the wind-down vehicle.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: SAFE marked gross; Margin Loan and Safe Credit in senior_debt; monetizing vs Magnolia/Asbury residual split to avoid double count.

economic_value.accounting_reference: STHO Q1 2026 Form 10-Q; FY2025 Form 10-K; 8-K 2026-04-01 Asbury deconsolidation.

component_groups.label: Safehold Inc. equity stake (~13.525M shares)
component_groups.valuation_basis: Low uses ~$12 SAFE forced-sale mark; base near current mark with modest sale friction; high ~$18.75 SAFE.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

component_groups.label: MD&A monetizing loans, AFS securities, land, other properties
component_groups.economic_claim: MD&A monetizing loans, AFS securities, land, other properties
component_groups.valuation_basis: Low/base/high vary recovery vs carrying on the MD&A schedule only; Magnolia/Asbury residual is separate.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The recovery range applies haircuts to the disclosed loans, AFS securities, land, and properties; the base case relies on repayment and land-sale evidence while zero-carry claims receive no value here.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Realization is modeled through the five-year wind-down horizon, with specific sale and repayment timing remaining uncertain.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental development capital is attributed to this monetizing bucket; sale costs and wind-down friction are deducted separately in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

component_groups.label: Magnolia Green and residual Asbury land / operating real estate
component_groups.economic_claim: Magnolia Green and residual Asbury land / operating real estate
component_groups.valuation_basis: Base applies a material realization haircut to carrying; high approaches carrying; low assumes slow/distressed sales.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The base case gives partial credit to carrying value because 2023 through Q1 2026 land and lot sales exceeded cost of sales, while the low case allows slow or distressed realization and the high case approaches carrying.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Land and operating-real-estate realization is modeled over the five-year wind-down horizon; no immediate sale of the remaining operating real estate is assumed.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: The component is valued after its carrying-value haircut; no separate development budget is added, and fee and sale-friction deductions remain in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

component_groups.label: Cash and restricted cash
component_groups.valuation_basis: Cash is near carrying; low allows modest restricted-cash leakage.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

component_groups.label: Safe Credit Facility and Margin Loan Facility
component_groups.economic_claim: Safe Credit Facility and Margin Loan Facility
component_groups.valuation_basis: Low allows PIK accretion / incremental draws; high assumes modest paydown from sales.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

component_groups.label: External management fees, termination overhang, and sale friction
component_groups.economic_claim: External management fees, termination overhang, and sale friction
component_groups.valuation_basis: Base ≈ PV of contractual fee path + modest sale friction; low adds early-termination / higher friction.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

component_groups.label: Zero-carry claims and entitlement surplus option
component_groups.economic_claim: Zero-carry claims and entitlement surplus option
component_groups.valuation_basis: Failure value zero; high credits modest surplus/zero-carry recovery.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The low case assigns zero, the base assigns only $0.20 per share, and the high case requires incremental recovery from zero-carry claims or entitlement surplus beyond Magnolia/Asbury carrying cases.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Any recovery is treated as a contingent result within the five-year wind-down horizon, not as current cash or a contracted asset sale.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental owner-funded development spend is credited to this option; any continuing holding, entitlement, management, or sale costs are captured in the existing operating and wind-down reserve components.

wisdom_applied: Klarman: book is an anchor; prior -1.19 cash/debt identity was a false bridge.
Greenblatt: finite asset-sale / capital-return event tree.
Horizon Kinetics: market-structure discount on a post-spin orphan.
limitations: Exact integer SAFE share count not disclosed (derived from FV/price).
Numeric margin LTV trigger levels not disclosed in 10-Q.
No asset-level third-party bids for Magnolia/Asbury residual.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Realization is modeled through the five-year wind-down horizon, with specific sale and repayment timing remaining uncertain.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The recovery range applies haircuts to the disclosed loans, AFS securities, land, and properties; the base case relies on repayment and land-sale evidence while zero-carry claims receive no value here.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental development capital is attributed to this monetizing bucket; sale costs and wind-down friction are deducted separately in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Magnolia Green and residual Asbury land / operating real estate
valuation_proof.evidence: Q1 2026 Form 10-Q (STHO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260508_rpt20260331_acc0001953366_26_000010.htm); proof base 7.5012/sh via probability_weighted_catalyst_nav@1.0.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Monetization clears below $4/sh after costs on this residual bucket.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Land and operating-real-estate realization is modeled over the five-year wind-down horizon; no immediate sale of the remaining operating real estate is assumed.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The base case gives partial credit to carrying value because 2023 through Q1 2026 land and lot sales exceeded cost of sales, while the low case allows slow or distressed realization and the high case approaches carrying.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: The component is valued after its carrying-value haircut; no separate development budget is added, and fee and sale-friction deductions remain in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

valuation_proof.evidence: Q1 2026 Form 10-Q (STHO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260508_rpt20260331_acc0001953366_26_000010.htm); proof base 5.1008/sh via net_asset_value@1.0.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Restricted cash is unavailable for equity or required as additional margin collateral.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Safe Credit Facility and Margin Loan Facility
valuation_proof.evidence: Q1 2026 Form 10-Q (STHO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260508_rpt20260331_acc0001953366_26_000010.htm); proof base -17.0996/sh via net_asset_value@1.0.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Debt claims exceed $17.50/sh or collateral call forces SAFE sale below low stake value.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: External management fees, termination overhang, and sale friction
valuation_proof.evidence: Q1 2026 Form 10-Q (STHO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260508_rpt20260331_acc0001953366_26_000010.htm); proof base -1.4/sh via net_asset_value@1.0.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Fees, termination payment, or tax leakage exceed $2.50/sh present value.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Zero-carry claims and entitlement surplus option
valuation_proof.evidence: Q1 2026 Form 10-Q (STHO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260508_rpt20260331_acc0001953366_26_000010.htm); proof base 0.2/sh via probability_weighted_catalyst_nav@1.0.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
valuation_proof.falsifier: No surplus to carrying and zero-carry assets remain worthless.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Any recovery is treated as a contingent result within the five-year wind-down horizon, not as current cash or a contracted asset sale.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The low case assigns zero, the base assigns only $0.20 per share, and the high case requires incremental recovery from zero-carry claims or entitlement surplus beyond Magnolia/Asbury carrying cases.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental owner-funded development spend is credited to this option; any continuing holding, entitlement, management, or sale costs are captured in the existing operating and wind-down reserve components.

wisdom_applied: Klarman: book is an anchor; prior -1.19 cash/debt identity was a false bridge.
Greenblatt: finite asset-sale / capital-return event tree.
Horizon Kinetics: market-structure discount on a post-spin orphan.
limitations: Exact integer SAFE share count not disclosed (derived from FV/price).
Numeric margin LTV trigger levels not disclosed in 10-Q.
No asset-level third-party bids for Magnolia/Asbury residual.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Safehold Inc. equity stake (~13.525M shares)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

falsifiers: SAFE fails to re-rate with lower rates, or forced sale/collateral path nets below the low case.
Sale/repayment proceeds imply recovery below $3.50/sh on this bucket.
Monetization clears below $4/sh after costs on this residual bucket.
Restricted cash is unavailable for equity or required as additional margin collateral.
Debt claims exceed $17.50/sh or collateral call forces SAFE sale below low stake value.
Fees, termination payment, or tax leakage exceed $2.50/sh present value.
No surplus to carrying and zero-carry assets remain worthless.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
